# docguard
> The enforcement tool for Canonical-Driven Development (CDD). Audit, generate, and guard your project documentation.

## Docs

- [ARCHITECTURE](docs-canonical/ARCHITECTURE.md): System architecture, component boundaries, and tech stack
- [CI-RECIPES](docs-canonical/CI-RECIPES.md): CI-RECIPES documentation
- [DATA-MODEL](docs-canonical/DATA-MODEL.md): Database schemas, entity relationships, and data flow
- [ENVIRONMENT](docs-canonical/ENVIRONMENT.md): Setup instructions, environment variables, and prerequisites
- [REQUIREMENTS](docs-canonical/REQUIREMENTS.md): REQUIREMENTS documentation
- [SECURITY](docs-canonical/SECURITY.md): Authentication, authorization, secrets management, and security policies
- [SURFACE-AUDIT](docs-canonical/SURFACE-AUDIT.md): SURFACE-AUDIT documentation
- [TEST-SPEC](docs-canonical/TEST-SPEC.md): Test coverage requirements, testing strategy, and quality rules

## Optional

- [DRIFT-LOG](DRIFT-LOG.md): Known deviations from canonical documentation
- [CHANGELOG](CHANGELOG.md): Version history and release notes
- [ROADMAP](ROADMAP.md): Planned features and development roadmap
- [AGENTS](AGENTS.md): AI agent behavior rules and workflow instructions

---
Generated by DocGuard v0.5 | [docguard-cli](https://www.npmjs.com/package/docguard-cli)
